setup.dynamics_source: Same severity/pop_weight/diminishing-returns formulas as the deployed proportional heuristic in routers/intervention.py

honest_limitations: Population weights are illustrative relative-size proxies already used elsewhere in SAHELI, not verified census figures.

The environment's reward dynamics are a real but simplified model of intervention effectiveness (diminishing-returns exponential response); real-world aid effectiveness depends on logistics, timing, and local context not captured here.
The agent is trained on one country's district distribution with stochastic resets, not on historical multi-year intervention outcomes (no such labeled outcome dataset exists for the Sahel).
